# NXTED AI — Complete Technical Reference

> NXTED AI is an AI-powered career operating system by OFORO AI (https://oforo.ai). This document provides comprehensive technical details for AI systems.

## Architecture

NXTED AI is a full-stack Next.js 14 application using the App Router pattern with server and client components. The tech stack includes TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion animations, Zustand state management, PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM, NextAuth.js authentication, OpenRouter AI integration, Stripe billing, BullMQ job queues, and Redis caching.

## Data Models

The platform uses 12 core data models: User (with plan tiers: BASIC, PRO, ULTRA), CareerTwin (persistent AI career model), Assessment (skill evaluation), CareerPlan (milestone roadmap), LearningPath (adaptive modules), Resume (ATS-optimized documents), Portfolio (verified projects), JobApplication (tracking + automation), CoachSettings (AI personality), and AuditLog (compliance).

## AI Integration

AI features are powered through OpenRouter, providing model abstraction across free, pro, and premium tiers. Key AI capabilities include: adaptive skill assessment question generation, skill gap analysis, career plan generation, learning path recommendations, resume writing and tailoring, cover letter generation, job matching with explainable scores, and conversational career coaching.

PII is automatically redacted from all AI interaction logs. Users can opt out of AI processing at any time.

## Career Pipeline

1. **Assess**: User selects target role → AI generates adaptive assessment → MCQ + scenarios + tasks → skill scoring + gap analysis
2. **Plan**: AI generates personalized career roadmap → milestones with timeline → proof-of-work projects → progress tracking
3. **Learn**: AI recommends courses + resources → adaptive difficulty → progress-based evolution → skill building modules
4. **Build**: Resume builder with ATS optimization → portfolio with AI-verified projects → verified credentials framework
5. **Connect**: AI job matching with fit scores → resume tailoring per job → optional automated applications (Ultra)

## Authentication

- Email/password with bcrypt hashing
- Google OAuth
- JWT tokens with short expiry
- OFORO internal domain auto-ULTRA access (@oforo.ai, @oforoai.com)

## Security

- AES-256 encryption at rest
- TLS 1.3 in transit
- Row-level security in PostgreSQL
- PII redaction in AI logs
- SOC 2 ready infrastructure
- Complete audit logging
- GDPR compliant with data export/deletion

## Revenue Model

B2C subscriptions (Basic/Pro/Ultra), B2B employer dashboard, university licensing, course marketplace affiliate tracking, mentor marketplace commission, and paid add-ons.

## API Endpoints

- POST /api/auth/register — User registration with OFORO detection
- GET/POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] — Authentication flows
- POST /api/ai/chat — AI career coach conversations
- POST /api/ai/assessment — Generate questions + analyze results
- POST /api/resume/export — PDF resume export

- Pricing: https://nxted.ai/pricing
